song.title: Abba Father
song.presentation: v1 c v2 c v3 c v4 c v5 c v6 c
song.lyrics: [v1] Abba, Father, hear our cry Mingled spirit deep within. [c] Abba, Father Abba, Father. [v2] Thank you, Father, for sending Him, The spirit of Your Son who cries deep within. [v3] Oh! How sweet is Abba’s name From our spirit through our heart. [v4] Every moment this mingled cry; To Your Beloved we’re joined thereby. [v5] Day by day, this cries so new; In Your Son we come back to You. [v6] In Your bosom here we’ll stay In Your Son and never stray
